Dear Racharla Gopala krishna, Congratulations! We are pleased to offer you the position of Junior Associate - Technical Teaching Assistant at iamneo- An NIIT Venture, under our Work-Integrated Learning Program (WILP). This role provides a unique opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience while pursuing a fully sponsored master's degree through a premier academic institution. Your date of joining will be 2nd June 2025. You will be designated as a Junior Associate - Technical Teaching Assistant, and your initial work location will be Coimbatore. Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a scanned copy of this letter on or before 19th May 2025. Hello, Good morning. It has now been the second Friday since my last follow-up, and I still have not received any update regarding the status of my application. I believe I deserve clear communication, especially after the time and effort I invested throughout the process. As I mentioned in our previous conversation, I am completely open to any outcome, even if I am not selected for the role. However, I made every effort to respond promptly to your emails, prepare for the interview, and even showed up earlier than the scheduled time out of respect for the opportunity and your team's time. I also shared during our last conversation that I was still willing to continue with your company despite previous instances where I felt I was ghosted, so I sincerely hope that this will not be the case again. I would greatly appreciate a clear update regarding my application status.

Dear Mr. Boulos, We are pleased to offer you the position of Management Trainee with ABN Australia Limited. Your remuneration on commencement will be $25,000 per annum. Salaries are paid directly into your nominated bank account on the 15th of every month. Upon successful completion of the two year training program you may be eligible to apply for a subsidised housing loan, company car and other package entitlements. We look forward to you joining us on Monday, April 2, 1990.
